name: gong
description: Read call recordings metadata, call content, and users from Gong

tools.name: List Calls
tools.description: List calls in a date window (max 90 days per request)

fromDateTime.description: Window start, ISO 8601 with timezone, e.g. 2026-06-01T00:00:00Z

toDateTime.description: Window end, ISO 8601 with timezone (within 90 days of fromDateTime)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from records.cursor in a previous response

historicalSummary.omitted: media URLs, parties, and call system metadata

tools.name: Get Call
tools.description: Get metadata for a single call

tools.name: Get Calls Extensive
tools.description: Retrieve detailed call data with content selectors (read-only retrieval via POST)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from records.cursor in a previous response

tools.name: Get Call Transcripts
tools.description: Retrieve transcripts for specific calls (read-only retrieval via POST)

filter.description: Filter object, e.g. {"callIds":["1234567890"]} or a fromDateTime/toDateTime window

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from records.cursor in a previous response

tools.name: List Users
tools.description: List Gong users in the company

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from records.cursor in a previous response

tools.name: Get User
tools.description: Get a Gong user by ID

prompts.title: Recent calls
prompts.prompt: List my Gong calls from the last 7 days with titles, durations, and owners.

prompts.title: Summarize a call
prompts.prompt: Get the transcript of my most recent Gong call and summarize the key points and next steps.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Gong API Setup

steps.title: Get API access
steps.description: Sign in to Gong as a technical administrator. API access requires a Gong subscription; ask your admin if you don't see the API settings.

steps.title: Create an access key
steps.description: In the Gong admin center go to Ecosystem → API (https://app.gong.io/company/api) and click 'Create' to generate an Access Key and Access Key Secret.

steps.title: Set environment variables
steps.description: Add GONG_ACCESS_KEY and GONG_ACCESS_KEY_SECRET to your .env.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Users to confirm the credentials work.

notes: Authentication is HTTP Basic: base64(accessKey:accessKeySecret) in the Authorization header
Default rate limits are 3 calls/second and 10,000 calls/day; a 429 response includes a Retry-After header
List Calls requires fromDateTime and toDateTime and caps the window at 90 days per request
